result.markdown:
---
title: "Comparative Analysis of Bathroom Contamination from Electric Hand Dryers vs. Paper Towels - Airborne"
---


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
#| label: load-pkgs
#| message: false
#| warning: false


#Install packman once in Console:
#install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  stats4,
  evd,
  triangle,
  truncdist,
  scales, 
  gt,
  EnvStats
  )
```
:::


Iterations


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
iterations <- 10000
set.seed(103106)
```
:::


## Parameters

General parameters


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
#pulmonary ventilation rate (minutes))
IR <- rtrunc(iterations,"norm", a = 0, b = Inf, mean = 0.012, sd = 0.0025)

#time in minutes 
t_occupancy <- 2.2933

#viral air concentrations
c_air_pt_low <- 115.7407
c_air_recessed_rw <- 370.3704
c_air_surfmount_rw <- 105.8201
c_air_nonhepa_rw <- 238.9486

H1N1_alpha <- 9.04E-01
H1N1_n50 <- 1.25E+06

H3N2_alpha <- 4.29E-01
H3N2_n50 <- 6.66E+05
```
:::


## Functions


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
dose_function <- function(C){
  C * IR * t_occupancy
}

beta_Poisson_function <- function(dose, alpha, n50 ){
  1 - ((1 + dose * (2^(1/alpha) - 1) / n50)^(-alpha))
}

adeno_k <- 6.07E-01
exponential_function <- function(k,dose){
  1 - exp(-k * dose )
}
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
get_summary_stats <- function(x) {
 data.frame(
  Min = sprintf("%.2E", min(x)),
  Median = sprintf("%.2E", median(x)),
  Max = sprintf("%.2E", max(x)),
  Mean = sprintf("%.2E", mean(x))
)
}
```
:::


## H1N1

#### Paper towels, low titer


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
H1N1_air_pt_low <-beta_Poisson_function(
  dose=dose_function(
    C=c_air_pt_low),
  alpha=H1N1_alpha,
  n50=H1N1_n50
  )

summary(H1N1_air_pt_low)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
5.953e-07 2.275e-06 2.646e-06 2.649e-06 3.027e-06 4.866e-06 
```


:::
:::


#### Recessed dryer, real world


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
H1N1_air_recessed_rw <-beta_Poisson_function(
  dose=dose_function(
    C=c_air_recessed_rw),
  alpha=H1N1_alpha,
  n50=H1N1_n50
  )

summary(H1N1_air_recessed_rw)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
1.905e-06 7.279e-06 8.467e-06 8.477e-06 9.685e-06 1.557e-05 
```


:::
:::


#### Surface-mounted dryer, real world


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
H1N1_air_surfmount_rw <-beta_Poisson_function(
  dose=dose_function(
    C=c_air_surfmount_rw),
  alpha=H1N1_alpha,
  n50=H1N1_n50
  )

summary(H1N1_air_surfmount_rw)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
5.443e-07 2.080e-06 2.419e-06 2.422e-06 2.767e-06 4.448e-06 
```


:::
:::


#### Non HEPA real world


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
H1N1_air_nonhepa_rw <-beta_Poisson_function(
  dose=dose_function(
    C=c_air_nonhepa_rw),
  alpha=H1N1_alpha,
  n50=H1N1_n50
  )

summary(H1N1_air_nonhepa_rw)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
1.229e-06 4.696e-06 5.463e-06 5.469e-06 6.248e-06 1.004e-05 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
get_summary_stats(H1N1_air_nonhepa_rw)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
       Min   Median      Max     Mean
1 1.23E-06 5.46E-06 1.00E-05 5.47E-06
```


:::
:::

## Adenovirus

#### Paper towels, low titer


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
adeno_air_pt_low <-exponential_function(
  dose=dose_function(
    C=c_air_pt_low),
  k=adeno_k
  )

get_summary_stats(H3N2_air_pt_low)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
       Min   Median      Max     Mean
1 1.85E-06 8.24E-06 1.52E-05 8.25E-06
```


:::
:::


#### Recessed dryer, real world


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
adeno_air_recessed_rw <-exponential_function(
  dose=dose_function(

  )

get_summary_stats(adeno_air_recessed_rw)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

1 7.50E-01 9.98E-01 1.00E+00 9.95E-01
```


:::
:::
